Patch Set 1:

not sure what kind of test I can add.. I can (did actually) simulate too large rnb exceeding PTLRPC_MAX_BRW_PAGES, but even debug kernel doesn't usually catch buffer overflow in this case. a regular kernel won't notice this kind of overflow.. i.e. the test wouldn't be useful.

Patch Set 1:

> not sure what kind of test I can add.. I can (did actually)
 > simulate too large rnb exceeding PTLRPC_MAX_BRW_PAGES, but even
 > debug kernel doesn't usually catch buffer overflow in this case. a
 > regular kernel won't notice this kind of overflow.. i.e. the test
 > wouldn't be useful.

This problem is a bit hard to fix, but it seems to be valid at the moment. A slightly simpler way to test this patch, you can trigger this bug by hooking osd_map_remote_to_local function then modifying the value of len via the debug kernel.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Alex, I see that this patch is in Oleg's master-next branch and is scheduled for landing, but your comment says "the patch isn't final ..."?

Should this be marked -1 to prevent it from landing, or will ZFS be fixed in a separate patch, and the comment here should be fixed before landing?  Mark -1 for now.

parents.subject: LU-11367 som: integrate LSOM with lfs find

commit.subject: LU-12612 osd: add lnb size down to osd
commit.message:
LU-12612 osd: add lnb size down to osd

so that each OSD can check for lnb array overflow.
the patch isn't final - there will be proper
implementation in osd-zfs and a new test.

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I43683c84e48006b4075f9a8b3e87cdfeae28c02b
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/35801
Reviewed-by: Mike Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
